skill.summary: Use when an agent needs live DeFi data from Base — ETH prices, trending pools, token scores, or wallet scans. No auth required.

latestVersion.changelog: Add Privacy & Data Handling section and Operator & Provenance section to address Vorus security review. Clarifies: stateless API (no logging), public on-chain data only, no auth/signing,  tier is anonymous balance check. Documents operator identity, open-source repo, and infrastructure.
